pages.raw_text:
The day nursery, established nH.
the members of the Woman's club
at lila Third avenue, will be
opened for business Monday. The
ladies who have the matter in hand
still lack few little conveniences
to make the nursery complete and
any donations that will aid in car
ing for the children will be much
appreciated. The women kept open
house at the nursery today and
thankfully received all donations
that were sent or subscriptions ten
dered. :,


The day nursery is intended -
aid poor people who, during work or
shopping hours, have no place to
leave their children. A nurse will
be installed at the home and look
after the children placed in the nur-
sery during the day. In this way.
mothers that are compelled to work
for a living or fathers with wives
dead, who keep house, can be
greatly helped.
